corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: إِلَّآ needs exception polarity, mustathnā/minhu, exception type, and case policy before the readable except hover is rich-certified
drill_prompt: For إِلَّآ, identify the exception frame before trusting the word except.
learner_explanation: Except is the start of a grammatical exception structure; the learner needs the frame, not only the English word.
nahw_lesson: Exception particles require polarity, main noun presence, exception type, and case behavior.
sarf_lesson: Strict surface separates exception إِلَّا from lexical إِلًّا noun rows.
what_failed: A readable exception string was treated as if it were a complete rich hover without the exception frame.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: إِلًّۭا is a lexical noun meaning bond/tie by context; it must not inherit exception-particle routing from stripped surface
drill_prompt: Compare إِلَّا and إِلًّا and explain which one is the exception particle.
learner_explanation: The shadda/tanwīn shape matters: this row is not the particle except.
nahw_lesson: Function-token routing must reject exact-surface lexical noun false positives.
sarf_lesson: Exact surface and POS block propagation from a particle family to a lexical noun.
what_failed: A lexical noun row appeared in an exception-heavy entry tranche and needed an explicit false-positive guard.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: لِلَّهِ requires lām relation plus Allah proper-name host and attachment/predicate review; do not treat it as a suffix-pronoun row
drill_prompt: Segment لِلَّهِ and explain why it is lām plus Allah, not a possessed suffix.
learner_explanation: The lām contributes the relation to/for/belongs to, while Allah is the governed proper name.
nahw_lesson: PP/proper-name rows require attachment and relation review; final-looking letters do not create a suffix pronoun.
sarf_lesson: Proper-name PP composition must be separated from noun-plus-suffix morphology.
what_failed: The row was string-populated, but the graph conflated PP/proper-name review with suffix accounting.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ has fā' plus finite plural verb; component waiting evidence cannot certify the whole token
drill_prompt: Explain why the component تَرَبَّص is not enough to certify فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟.
learner_explanation: The written token includes an extra function piece and a finite verb form, so the learner needs more than the host family.
nahw_lesson: The fā' function and clause relation remain part of the hover decision.
sarf_lesson: Component-level candidates may guide review but never certify the written token.
visible_bad_hover: to wait and see, be waiting
what_failed: Component evidence was useful but still below whole-token morphology and function proof.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: يُبَايِعُونَكَ requires finite verb review plus كَ object before a learner-safe hover such as they pledge to you can be certified
drill_prompt: Find the attached object pronoun in يُبَايِعُونَكَ and explain why bare pledge prose is incomplete.
learner_explanation: The final kāf contributes you and must be visible in the hover breakdown.
nahw_lesson: The verb-object relation controls the English contribution and may require context/referent review.
sarf_lesson: Finite verb person/number and attached object suffixes come before entry prose.
visible_bad_hover: to exchange a pledge for a heavenly reward
what_failed: A finite verb with an attached object suffix inherited an entry explanation without accounting for you.
